title: ornithogalum bifolium
intro: Ornithogalum bifolium, also known as the two-leafed starflower or two-leaved ornithogalum, is a plant species belonging to the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Ornithogalum bifolium is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
